mapper.select: SELECT user_id, username, password_hash, display_name, role, is_active, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM adm_user_mst ORDER BY user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO adm_user_mst (username, password_hash, display_name, role, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE adm_user_mst SET display_name = #{displayName}, role = #{role}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE adm_user_mst SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
